sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 64 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 06.05.2026 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2017 without any progress. On 06.11.2017 following order was passed: “06.11.2017 Mr. Amjad Javed Hashmi, advocate for applicant. Learned counsel for the applicant requests for time to prepare the case. At his request, adjourned.” On 15.12.2017, following order was passed: “15.12.2017 Mr. Amjad Javed Hashmi, advocate. 1. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2. Learned counsel requests for short adjournment to prepare the case. Adjourned to 19.01.2018 as requested.” On 10.01.2020, following order was passed: “10.01.2020 Mr. Amjad Javed Hashmi, advocate for applicant” 1. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2. Learned counsel requests for time to reformulate the questions. Time is granted. Adjourned.” Today learned counsel is present and states that reformulated questions have not been provided even more than six years have passed and despite time having been sought in such regard. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001.

Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
